title: 600 TidyZ Food Freezer Bags with TIe Handles. Large Kitchen Storage Bags. For Fresh Food, Vegetables, Fruit, Meat, Meal Prep, Sandwiches. Bulk Pack. 6 Boxes of 100 Bags
features: FREEZER & FRIDGE SAFE - Durable bags designed for freezer storage without tearing or splitting. Equally suitable for refrigerator storage and keeping food fresh at room temperature
CONVENIENT TIE HANDLES - Easy-seal tie handles keep food fresh and prevent freezer burn. Quick to open and close, making food storage hassle-free. No twist ties or clips needed
BULK VALUE PACK - 600 freezer bags total in 6 convenient boxes of 100 bags each. Perfect for families, meal preppers, and bulk buyers. Excellent value for money with long-lasting supply
HYGIENIC & PRACTICAL - Clear bags make it easy to identify contents. Suitable for home, commercial kitchens, and catering. Helps reduce food waste by storing leftovers and portions safely

VERSATILE FOOD STORAGE - Ideal for freezing meat, fish, vegetables, fruit, bread, batch cooking, and meal prep. Also perfect for sandwiches, snacks, and packed lunches. Keeps food fresh for longer. Bag Size 15x26x40cm
